themeName: Salt & Meadow: A Cottagecore Slow-Sea Journey

visual.aestheticLabel: Salt & Meadow: A Cottagecore SlowâSea Journey

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: Use Leisure Life Interactiveâs brand headline type as first choice; if a project fallback is required, select a high-contrast humanist serif with soft terminals for an organic, bookish feel.
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Use Leisure Life Interactiveâs brand sans for clarity; if a fallback is required, choose a modern grotesk with gentle curves for calm legibility.
suggestedFonts: Garamond Premier Display (headline fallback, light weights)

visual.imageryMood: Pastoral-at-sea calm: real grass and teak against an open horizon, linen hints, soft hair movement in coastal wind, a quiet cup by the rail. The ship and ocean read first; cottagecore lives in texture, posture, and one natural cue.
visual.lightingStyle: North Atlantic softnessâcool, silvery daylight with moments of warm low sun; gentle overcast that flatters linen and wood; twilight hush with subtle glow. Eclipse-week mood may be a serene mid-day dim without spectacle.
visual.compositionNotes: Hero-safe frames that prioritize ship lines, horizon, and the Lawn Clubâs living texture. Compose with generous negative space, low object density, and one believable cue (a sprig, a throw edge, a straw brim). Keep guests relaxed and small in frame, 1â3 people max, candid stances, eyes to sea. Avoid staged tables or signage intruding into foreground.
avoidList: Crowded craft tables or lines of people doing the same activity
Whiteboards, chalkboards, flip charts, or printed agendas
Industrial tools, glue guns, cutting mats, or workbenches
Branded lanyards, table tents, or wayfinding signage
Oversized floral arches or photo-booth sets
Overfilled picnic spreads that read as catering
Group formations that feel like a class or demo
referenceMoodboard: Solstice-class Lawn Club textureâreal grass, teak, canvas
Oat linen throws catching soft wind
Seafoam, moss, and mist palette against charcoal railings
Straw hat rim, cuffed sleeve, enamel mug at dawn
Twilight on deckâdim folk notes, sky first
North Atlantic lightâsilver mornings, warm last light

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Cottagecore shows up as small, guest-led natural texturesâwhat someone wears, sips, or tucks into a pocketâlightly echoed by ship-friendly styling; never equipment, schedules, or staff-led setups.
cruiseNativeMoments: Sunrise tea on the Lawn Club with a throw and horizon air
Unhurried promenade walk with a rail-side pause
Window-seat daydreaming with coffee and sea drift
Quiet stargazing with blankets and low conversation
Aft-deck lounge time with a soft breeze and a book
nicheEnhancedMoments: A linen shirt and straw brim at the rail; seafoam scarf catching wind
Herb sprig resting on a saucer beside oat-toned tea
Slim notebook and pencil open at a window, one pressed petal marking a page
A postcard briefly opened on a cafÃ© table with a tiny pocket press nearby (book-sized, no setup)
A petite woven basket for a photoâbread, berries, then enjoyed casually
Low-volume acoustic folk in an outdoor nook; guests simply settling in
implausibleLiteralizations: Sustainability panels with badges or certificates
Foraging or homesteading âintensivesâ requiring tools or outcomes
Long communal craft stations with supplies and instructions
Chore rosters, sign-up tables, or hosted hours
Floral arches, photo booths, or branded backdrops on deck
allowedProps: Small herb sprigs and a few dried blooms
Slim notebooks, pencils, and simple postcards
Straw hats, woven headbands, soft scarves
Petite woven basket used briefly for a photo
discouragedProps: Sewing machines, glue guns, cutting mats, or sharp shears
Lighting rigs, tripods, ring lights, or microphones
Large format flower presses or drying racks
Whiteboards, lecterns, clipboards, or signage systems
Bulk supply carts, labeled bins, or trade-show displays

messaging.subSlogan: A cottagecore drift at seaâlinen layers, herbâkissed tea, open horizon.
messaging.elevatorPitch: Salt & Meadow is a gentle, cottagecore take on a North Atlantic sailingâopen grass underfoot, soft linens, and a horizon that slows your breathing. Think quiet tea by the rail, a penciled line in a pocket notebook, a single dried bloom tucked into a postcard. The ship does the moving; you do the savoring. On an Iceland arc that includes an eclipse weekâs rare light, the vibe stays simple and guest-ledâtiny natural cues, lowâpressure evenings, and oceanâfirst calm.
messaging.voicePersona: Warm coastal naturalist with modern-minimal restraintâobservational, kind, and unhurried; never salesy or programmatic.

merch.conceptStatement: Soft-humor, slogan-led tees that pair nautical calm with botanical charm. Single-ink or two-ink graphics sized for front-of-shirt printing; relaxed typographic rhythm, no busy scenes.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Sea air on real grass. A cup warming your hands. Linen at your shoulders. Out here the days slow into soft pagesâone penciled line, one small bloom, one easy laugh by the rail. Acoustic notes drift through the Lawn as the horizon does the work. No hurry. Just salt, meadow, and the gentle company of the North Atlantic sky.
audio.hypeClipScript: Salt air. Meadow heart. Real grass underfoot, linen in the breeze, a horizon that unknots the day. Drift easyâtea at dawn, twilit calm, a sky worth looking up for. A cottagecore slowâsea journey, shipâfirst and quietly yours.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm, calm alto; coastal hush; neutral accent; intimate mic; unhurried pacing at ~115 wpm.
audio.musicMood: Acoustic folk with nylon guitar and soft fiddle, brushed percussion, subtle harmonium; field-recorded sea air lightly mixed; no drops, no spotlight vocalsâcalm, companionable, and horizon-forward.

tiktokOrganic.hook: What if cottagecore had an ocean?

narrative.title: Salt & Meadow Drift on Real Grass
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Salt air. Meadow heart. Real grass underfoot, linen in a soft breeze, and a horizon that slows everything down. A quiet sip. A small smile. The ship does the moving; you do the savoring.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Open on horizon and Lawn Club grass, not faces. Two guests sideâbyâside on a throw, one straw brim catching wind; cut to hands around an enamel mug with a tiny herb sprig on the saucer; end on silhouettes leaning at the rail at twilight. Keep the ship lines and ocean as hero; cottagecore appears in texture and posture, not props.
narrative.backgroundDescription: North Atlantic lightâsilver morning into warm last light on the Lawn Club. Gentle sea hush audible. No staged tables; minimal objects.
narrative.musicMood: Nylon guitar, soft fiddle, brushed percussion; ocean air lightly mixed.

tiktokOrganic.caption: Salt & Meadow is a slowâsea mood: linen layers, herbâkissed tea, and a horizon worth staring at. Pastoral at sea.

instagramReels.visualConcept: Goldenâhour rail lean: two guests in linen and light knits share a quiet glance while grass and sea fill the frame. No objects centeredâposture and breeze tell the story.

instagramReels.caption: A cottagecore drift at seaâlinen, low sun, open water. Salt air. Meadow heart.

emailHeader.preheader: A cottagecore drift at seaâlinen layers, herbâkissed tea, horizon first.
emailHeader.bodyDirection: Keep copy minimal and atmospheric: oneâsentence beats with gentle line breaks. Invite a calm scroll, not a sell.
emailHeader.visualDirection: Fullâbleed hero of Lawn Club to horizon; inset detail of straw brim/linen edge. Palette in soft seafoam and oat.

discordBanner.serverBannerDescription: Wide horizon over Lawn Club grass with a linen throw corner and soft breeze; text overlay minimal: âSalt & Meadowâ and âpastoral at sea.â
discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Warm, unhurried greeting that emphasizes calm companionship and oceanâfirst vibes; invite gentle sharing of window views, songs, and pageâturn pausesâno schedules, no pressure.

heroExplainer.title: Salt & Meadow â A Cottagecore SlowâSea Journey
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Sea air on real grass. A cup warming your hands. Linen at your shoulders. Out here the days slow into soft pagesâone penciled line, one small bloom, one easy laugh by the rail. Acoustic notes drift as the horizon does the work. No hurry. Just salt, meadow, and the gentle company of the North Atlantic sky.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Open with empty Lawn Club and horizon (architecture cue). Introduce two guests in linen by posture and sideâprofile, not frontâlit hero shots (posture/wardrobe cues). Cut to herb sprig on saucer (object cue), then windowâseat daydream with soft reflections (architectural cue). Brief nod to eclipseâweek dim as a serene tone shift, no spectacle (atmosphere cue). End with paired silhouettes at the rail and the line: âPastoral at sea.â
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Shot list lives entirely on open deck, Lawn Club, and window nooks. North Atlantic light: cool day, warm last light, twilight hush. Low object density; horizon drives composition.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Nylon guitar, gentle fiddle, brushed percussion, sea air foley; intimate, steady tempo.

tiktokSeed.scriptOrNarration: Inhale city. Exhale sea. Salt air. Meadow heart.
tiktokSeed.visualDirectionNotes: Hard cut from close crop of linen sleeve lifting in breeze to a wide horizon with grass underfoot. Two guests step into frame and settleâno dialogue, just a shared glance (posture cue). No tabletop or overt props.
tiktokSeed.backgroundDescription: Goldenâhour Lawn Club with soft wind; ship lines and ocean dominate frame.
tiktokSeed.musicMood: Singleâguitar motif with sea hush; no vocals.

thresholdAnnouncement.title: Meadow List Is Open
thresholdAnnouncement.scriptOrNarration: A quiet note for calm seekers: our Meadow List is open. When youâre ready, weâll keep a spot in the hush. Pastoral at sea.
thresholdAnnouncement.visualDirectionNotes: Start on a postcard corner at a window (object cue, minimal), lift to ocean and deck canvas (architectural cue). Cut to two hands resting near each other on a throw (posture cue). Overlay soft text: âMeadow List is open.â
thresholdAnnouncement.backgroundDescription: Window nook and Lawn Club frames with North Atlantic light; minimal text overlays in brand serif/sans pairing.
thresholdAnnouncement.musicMood: Harmonium pad with gentle guitar; warm, unhurried.

merchReveal.title: Salt & Meadow Tees â Soft Threads, Sea Air
merchReveal.scriptOrNarration: Soft threads for soft days. Salt & Meadow, printed in moss ink. Pastoral at sea.
merchReveal.visualDirectionNotes: Clothâonâgrass reveal: fold of oat heather tee unfurls on Lawn Club with breeze. Detail shots: stitched ampersand, tiny sprig icon, sleeve line. End with tee draped on a teak rail; ocean leads. No model necessary; if included, keep faces offâcamera and ship first.
